name: Delivery Challan Status Report
query:
select A.name as "DC No", A.date as "DC Date", A.supplier_name "Supplier Name", B.description as "Description of Items", B.qty as "Qty", 
B.Remarks as "Remarks" 
from
`tabDelivery Challan` A inner join 
`tabDelivery Challan Item` B on A.name = B.parent
where 
 DATE(A.date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s 
order by A.name
